title: How has global extreme poverty evolved since 1950?
instructions: Click and drag to draw a line with your best guess, starting from the global poverty rate in 1950 on the left
encouragement: Keep going! Draw your guess all the way to 2025 on the right
done: Click the button to see your result. You can still adjust your guess
good_result: Nice work! Your guess was on average {result} percentage points off the actual global poverty rate, which is around 10 percent today
ok_result: Not bad! Your guess was on average {result} percentage points off the actual global poverty rate, which is around 10 percent today
hm_result: Hmm, that could've been better. Your guess was on average {result} percentage points off the actual global poverty rate, which is around 10 percent today
poor_result: That was poor. Your guess was on average {result} percentage points off the actual global poverty rate, which is around 10 percent today
source: World Bank Poverty and Inequality Platform, World Bank Macro and Poverty Outlook April 2026, Mahler et al. 2026, and Mahler et al. 2025.

_meta.approvalNote: interactive draw + scroller choreography + venn + scatter
